554 ANTPLTLT_TKNG_DSCHRG_CD ANTPLTLT_TKNG_DSCHRG_CD High-Risk Drug (Is taking): Antiplatelet (Dsch) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of discharge, the patient was taking any medications by pharmacological classification, not how it is used, 
from the antiplatelet class.
